name: nanoPencil print mode
summary: `--mode print` enables non-interactive stdin/stdout piping for scripting and CI/CD.
detail: Located in `modes/print-mode.ts`, invoked via `npx tsx cli.ts --mode print`. Reads stdin, sends to agent, writes stdout without TUI. Useful for automation, CI/CD pipelines, and programmatic subprocess usage.
content: Located in `modes/print-mode.ts`, invoked via `npx tsx cli.ts --mode print`. Reads stdin, sends to agent, writes stdout without TUI. Useful for automation, CI/CD pipelines, and programmatic subprocess usage.

name: Verbose diagnostics to stderr
summary: Route verbose diagnostics to stderr to keep stdout clean for piping.
detail: Implemented `verbose` option in `PrintModeOptions`. When enabled, prints structured diagnostics (model, session, timing, errors) to stderr using `stderrDim()`. Stdout remains strictly for response text/events, enabling safe piping. Auto-enabled in dev mode, disabled in production.
content: Implemented `verbose` option in `PrintModeOptions`. When enabled, prints structured diagnostics (model, session, timing, errors) to stderr using `stderrDim()`. Stdout remains strictly for response text/events, enabling safe piping. Auto-enabled in dev mode, disabled in production.

name: SessionHeader lacks parentId
summary: Fixed TS error: `parentId` does not exist on `SessionHeader` type.
detail: Encountered and resolved a TypeScript compilation error where `parentId` was incorrectly accessed on `SessionHeader`. Ensured type definitions match actual interface to prevent build failures.
content: Encountered and resolved a TypeScript compilation error where `parentId` was incorrectly accessed on `SessionHeader`. Ensured type definitions match actual interface to prevent build failures.

name: Dev/release print mode tests
summary: Added 5 tests to validate dev vs release print mode behavior.
detail: Created `test/print-mode-release-compat.test.ts` to verify stdout/stderr separation, error handling, and JSON output across dev and production environments, ensuring the verbose flag doesn't leak into release builds.
content: Created `test/print-mode-release-compat.test.ts` to verify stdout/stderr separation, error handling, and JSON output across dev and production environments, ensuring the verbose flag doesn't leak into release builds.
